title: PolicyEvaluationTrace
description: A detailed trace of the policy evaluation process for an action proposal.

trace_id.description: Unique identifier for this evaluation trace.

run_id.description: The run this trace belongs to.

action_id.description: The action proposal this trace covers.

evaluated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the evaluation occurred.

rules_evaluated.description: Individual rule evaluations that contributed to the final result.

final_result.description: The final policy decision produced by this trace.

deterministic_fingerprint.description: A stable hash of the evaluation inputs, matching the corresponding PolicyDecision.
